title: Project
description: Launcher project definition. Describes display info, tmux session layout, and optional lifecycle scripts.

name.description: Display name shown in the project picker.

description.description: One-line description shown in the fzf preview.
examples: Snow melting platform — backend, dashboard & shop

dir.description: Absolute path to the project root directory.

session.description: tmux session name. If omitted the project has no session and no launch/close actions are available.

lifecycle.description: Named lifecycle scripts surfaced as actions in the launcher. Any key is valid — each key becomes an action whose label matches the key name and whose value is the absolute path to the script to run. Keys are shown in definition order.

additionalProperties.description: Absolute path to the script for this lifecycle action.

tmux.description: tmux session layout. Required when 'session' is set.

windows.description: Ordered list of windows. The first entry creates the session; subsequent entries are appended.

name.description: Window name as shown in the tmux status bar.

command.description: Command passed directly as the pane executable (new-session / new-window last arg). Use this for regular programs. Mutually exclusive with send_keys.

send_keys.description: Command sent via tmux send-keys into an already-running interactive shell. Use this when the command is a shell alias or needs sourced environment (e.g. exportidf). Mutually exclusive with command.

source_tmux_conf.description: When true, sources ~/.tmux.conf in this window after creation. Needed for windows created before the tmux plugin chain runs.

not.description: command and send_keys are mutually exclusive.

focus.description: Name of the window to select after all windows are created. Defaults to the first window.
